must_do.full_text: Update: I've joined @AnthropicAI and taken leave from the university. Excited to work with many talented, mission-driven people on the defining technology of our time.

must_do.full_text:
🇺🇸 Elon just walked the first Optimus production line at Fremont, and it's officially begun installation.

The modular line can be reconfigured as the robot evolves, with dozens more planned across the factory.

This is the space that used to build the Model S and Model X, now https://t.co/qAo215jg6p

终于型选题：生产线正式启动
angles: 马斯克亲临Optimus生产线，人形机器人量产时代来临

must_do.full_text:
Claude Fable 5 is available again in Cursor.

It leads all models on CursorBench, but is the most expensive per task.

must_do.full_text:
We took a 30B model and split it in two to write tokens in parallel instead of one at a time.

Introducing Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower: a diffusion language model from NVIDIA Research adapted from Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B. Here’s how it works: one half holds the context, the other https://t.co/Uza5QAO7N9
must_do.summary: NVIDIA推出Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower，将30B模型分成两部分并行生成tokens，相比逐个生成大幅提速。这是扩散语言模型在推理优化上的新探索。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：首次将扩散模型应用于并行token生成
有明确技术创新点：30B模型分割+并行推理
angles: NVIDIA突破：30B模型并行生成，推理速度翻倍
扩散模型新用途｜两塔架构如何加速LLM推理
从逐个到并行｜Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower的技术突破

must_do.full_text:
In March, Meta signed a $27B cloud services deal with Nebius. In April, Meta signed a $21B expansion of their cloud services agreement with CoreWeave.

Two weeks ago, Bloomberg reported that Meta signed up to rent 1.6GW of data center capacity from Crusoe. And just 3 days ago,
must_do.summary: Meta近三月内签署三笔巨额云服务协议：Nebius 27B美元、CoreWeave 21B美元扩展、Crusoe 1.6GW数据中心。显示Meta在AI基础设施投资的激进策略。

FANÁTICO OBSESIONADO ROMPIÓ LA IA

Un estudio académico reveló el lado más perturbador de la Inteligencia Artificial, tras descubrir a un usuario masivamente obsesionado con el juego "Doki Doki Literature Club!".

Este individuo usó ChatGPT miles de veces durante meses con una https://t.co/cZjKkTQT6J

priority.full_text: Turns out Elon is right again. The shittiest layer in AI is the model layer. The real money in AI is in compute, energy, and applications. Elon has all 3. Without Chinese open weight models, OpenAI and anthropic would have been happy oligopolies and made trillions. Now, they
priority.summary: 用户分析：AI产业真正的利润在计算、能源和应用层，而非模型层。Elon掌握全部三层，中国开源模型打破OpenAI垄断。AI行业观点/趋势分析。
angles: AI真正的钱在这三层，不在模型
中国开源模型如何打破硅谷垄断
Elon为什么赢：掌握计算+能源+应用

priority.full_text:
Following conversations with the US government, we’ve updated our cybersecurity safeguards.

The vast majority of coding work is unaffected.

In the near term, the new safeguards will flag a slightly higher fraction of harmless requests than the previous Fable safeguards; we’re
priority.summary: Claude更新网络安全防护措施，与美国政府沟通后调整了代码工作的安全政策。新防护会误标更多无害请求，但大多数编码工作不受影响。
